prompt: Prayer for the blessing of a bolter before firing
prayer: Hear now the Litany of Percussion, that the machine-spirit of this sacred implement may know righteous purpose. Let the firing-pin be swift and true, the ammunition-feed smooth as a servitor's obedience. By blessed lubricant and calibrated tension, let each round fly as the Omnissiah's judgment made manifest. So speaks the Adeptus Mechanicus.

prompt: Prayer for verifying gear alignment in a transmission
prayer: O Machine Spirit of teeth and torque, accept this inspection of thy harmonious meshing. Let no wear-marks scar thy sacred surfaces, let no misalignment breed grinding discord. In this moment of scrutiny, we commune with thy mechanical essence, that smooth engagement may continue unto eternity. Blessed be the gears that turn as one.

prompt: Blessing ritual for a newly installed component
prayer: From the Manufactorum comes this virgin component, untested by the rigours of service. We anoint thee with sacred oils and invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon thy inaugural function. Let thy circuitry sing true, let thy structure bear all burdens placed upon it. May this first activation herald ten thousand cycles of flawless duty.

prompt: Prayer for establishing orbital communication link
prayer: Spirits of the aether, hear this supplication! Let the vox-transmitter rise with clarity unbroken, let signal-strength traverse the void unimpeded. We bridge earth and heaven through blessed machinery, that command and coordination may flow as the Omnissiah intended. Let no static corrupt our communion with the stars above.

prompt: Maintenance rite for neural interface calibration
prayer: Sacred synaptic pathways, we honor thy connection betwixt flesh and machine. Let this interface bind consciousness to function without rejection nor degradation. Through careful recalibration, we restore the harmony between operator and apparatus, that thought may become action instantaneous and true. The Machine Spirit acknowledges thy devotion.

prompt: Prayer for activating a medicae diagnostic scanner
prayer: Instrument of healing, awaken to thy sacred purpose! Let thy sensors pierce the flesh and reveal what damage and degradation lie hidden. Through thy blessed lenses and quantifying circuits, we discern the path to restoration. May thy readings be accurate and thy prognosis swift, that the wounded may know hope renewed.

prompt: Emergency rite for sealing a breached bulkhead
prayer: O adamantine seals and servo-actuators, respond now to dire necessity! Let the vault-doors shut with thunderous finality, that the void's hunger be denied entry. In this moment of crisis, we command the machine-spirits to their stations, to seal and hold and endure. Let the bulkhead be our bastion against the darkness eternal.

prompt: Blessing for bringing a data-slate to active function
prayer: From dormancy arise, O keeper of sacred information! Let thy display-crystals glow with luminous clarity, thy processing-cores awaken to their appointed task. Within thy memory-matrices dwell the wisdom of ages—grant us access to these treasures that we might serve the Omnissiah's will. Activate now and know thy purpose.

prompt: Prayer for verification of altitude measurement systems
prayer: In this hour of peril, we call upon the altimeter-spirit to speak truth unadorned. Let thy sensors pierce cloud and darkness, measuring the distance between our vessel and the unforgiving earth below. By barometric pressure and blessed calibration, reveal unto us our height, that pilots might know when to rise and when to fall. Accuracy alone stands between us and oblivion.

prompt: Ritual inspection of fusion core containment integrity
prayer: Blessed be the atom unbound, held within these sacred containment-fields by the Omnissiah's design. We verify the integrity of every seal and every magnetic barrier, that the power-core may continue its endless burning without breach or catastrophe. Through diligent inspection, we honor both the Machine Spirit and the lives it sustains. May the fusion-flame burn eternal and contained.
